Uses of Class
neqsim.process.chemistry.scale.ElectrolyteScaleCalculator

Packages that use ElectrolyteScaleCalculator
Package
Description
neqsim.process.chemistry.scale
 

  • Uses of ElectrolyteScaleCalculator in neqsim.process.chemistry.scale

    Methods in neqsim.process.chemistry.scale that return ElectrolyteScaleCalculator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ElectrolyteScaleCalculator
    ElectrolyteScaleCalculator.calculate()
    Computes ionic strength, Davies-equation activity coefficients, and activity-corrected saturation indices for CaCO3, BaSO4, CaSO4, SrSO4.
    ElectrolyteScaleCalculator
    ElectrolyteScaleCalculator.setAnions(double cl, double so4, double hco3, double co3)
    Sets anion concentrations in mg/L.
    ElectrolyteScaleCalculator
    ElectrolyteScaleCalculator.setCations(double ca, double ba, double sr, double mg, double na, double k, double fe)
    Sets cation concentrations in mg/L.
    ElectrolyteScaleCalculator
    ElectrolyteScaleCalculator.setCO2PartialPressureBar(double pco2)
    Sets CO2 partial pressure in bar.
    ElectrolyteScaleCalculator
    ElectrolyteScaleCalculator.setPH(double pH)
    Sets pH of aqueous phase.
    ElectrolyteScaleCalculator
    ElectrolyteScaleCalculator.setPressureBara(double p)
    Sets system pressure in bara.
    ElectrolyteScaleCalculator
    ElectrolyteScaleCalculator.setTemperatureCelsius(double tC)
    Sets temperature in Celsius.
